'''pafulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docket|docket]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docket|docket]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pafulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæfilith|pæfilith]] || [[word:pæfilij|pæfilij]] || [[word:pæfilish|pæfilish]] || [[word:pæfili|pæfili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pafufuluth|pafufuluth]] || [[word:pafufuluj|pafufuluj]] || [[word:pafufulush|pafufulush]] || [[word:pafufulu|pafufulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pafuluth|pafuluth]] || [[word:pafuluj|pafuluj]] || [[word:pafulush|pafulush]] || [[word:pafulu|pafulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pafufluth|pafufluth]] || [[word:pafufluj|pafufluj]] || [[word:pafuflush|pafuflush]] || [[word:pafufluf|pafufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pafuluthu|pafuluthu]] || [[word:pafuluju|pafuluju]] || [[word:pafulushu|pafulushu]] || [[word:pafuluku|pafuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pafuluth|pafuluth]] || [[word:pafuluj|pafuluj]] || [[word:pafulush|pafulush]] || [[word:pafulu|pafulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pafuluthul|pafuluthul]] || [[word:pafulujul|pafulujul]] || [[word:pafulushul|pafulushul]] || [[word:pafulukul|pafulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pafuluthuthu|pafuluthuthu]] || [[word:pafulujuju|pafulujuju]] || [[word:pafulushushu|pafulushushu]] || [[word:pafuluku|pafuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pafuluthun|pafuluthun]] || [[word:pafulujun|pafulujun]] || [[word:pafulushun|pafulushun]] || [[word:pafulukun|pafulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pafuluthuoro|pafuluthuoro]] || [[word:pafulujuoro|pafulujuoro]] || [[word:pafulushuoro|pafulushuoro]] || [[word:pafulukuoro|pafulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
